subcodes.first_line: O thou who art guided by divine guidance! His Holiness Moses, the Interlocutor of God, beheld the light of guidance from the burning bush in the Sinai [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهتدی بهدایت الهی حضرت کلیم الله نور هدایت را از نار موقده در سدره سینا
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @firmness in the Covenant, @thankfulness; gratitude
